key.name: enabled
key.description: When true the extension will activate the video screensaver after the configured idle timeout.

key.name: idle-timeout-minutes
key.description: Number of minutes of user inactivity before the screensaver is activated. A value of 0 disables the automatic timeout.

key.name: videos-folder
key.description: Absolute path to a local directory containing video files (.mp4, .mkv, .webm, .avi) to be played as the screensaver. All video files found in the directory will be played in sequence.

key.name: shuffle-videos
key.description: When true the videos in the folder will be played in random order. When false they are played in alphabetical order.

key.name: lock-screen-after
key.summary: Lock the screen after the screensaver exits
key.description: When true the GNOME screen shield will be activated as soon as user input dismisses the screensaver.

key.name: mute-video
key.description: When true the video will play without audio. When false the video audio plays at the system volume level.
